description: CompositionWhite printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, has a round slit neck with red piping that extends into a buttoned chest placket, has pintucks along the front centre chest and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this white printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this round slit neck, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
